data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. DOWN UNDER STUNNAH finished a close-up fourth of 12 at long odds last start over 2030m at Doomben after coming home well from seventh into the turn. Trained here and over a longer trip in an easier line-up has winning claims. 1. POWER ACE went forward from a wide draw last start to find the front and fought on well to the line to score an easy win over 2000m at Gold Coast Poly. Expected to prove hard to beat again. 6. SACRED BULL is better than recent runs would suggest. He placed third of 11 here four runs back and on best form can finish in the money. 2. AMALGAMATION showed little early speed last start and failed to come on in the straight when tenth, beaten 6 lengths, over 2170m at this track. Looks well placed so expect a better run this time.","runners":[7,1,6,2],"exclusive":true}
